name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W213/S213, C238/A238 (3.0L 6-cyl turbo petrol, EQ Boost)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M256 inline-six with ISG/EQ Boost (E 450) and AMG M256 (E 53): 15,000 km / 12 months EU class; rec 10,000 km spirited use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes-Benz maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 W212 2.0 petrol proxy; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v20705-2017/service has no E 350 table).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24-month renewal per Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Inspect each service; E 53 wears friction material faster under hard use.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 six-cylinder spark reference).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection turbo I6: consider ~120,000 km if carbon-related symptoms.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (Tier 2 W212 2.0 petrol proxy for W213 M256 Oil Service spacing)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W213; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W213
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W213 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 spark reference; E 53 AMG may use AMG supplement for earlier renewal)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz W213 M256 service manual maintenance table (engine coolant); time cap per platform coolant rule
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC+ transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: AWD front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection turbo M256 — intake cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
